persona.name: Budget-Conscious Result Seeker
persona.pain_en: Budget concerns reduce trust in expensive plans.
persona.desire_en: Reliable progress from a practical system.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs strong value and risk-reduction cues.
persona.pain_hi: Budget concerns reduce trust in expensive plans.
persona.desire_hi: Reliable progress from a practical system.
persona.proof_needed_hi: Needs strong value and risk-reduction cues.

EN.headline: This did not feel like another gamble.
EN.support_line: The support and progress made it feel worth trying.
EN.context_line: If you are careful with money because too many things overpromise, this feels like a smarter step.

HI.headline: This did not feel like another gamble.
HI.support_line: The support and progress made it feel worth trying.
HI.context_line: If you are careful with money because too many things overpromise, this feels like a smarter step.

persona.name: Wedding / Event Deadline Persona
persona.pain_en: Event deadline creates pressure and urgency.
persona.desire_en: Visible progress in a short, realistic window.
persona.pain_hi: Event deadline creates pressure and urgency.
persona.desire_hi: Visible progress in a short, realistic window.

EN.headline: I needed something that could show in time.
EN.support_line: The 15-day structure made it feel clear and focused.
EN.context_line: For people working toward a wedding, trip, or event, this gives a realistic short path.

HI.headline: I needed something that could show in time.
HI.support_line: The 15-day structure made it feel clear and focused.
HI.context_line: For people working toward a wedding, trip, or event, this gives a realistic short path.

persona.name: Confidence-First Persona (Appearance + Energy)
persona.pain_en: Low confidence from body discomfort and low energy.
persona.desire_en: Feel lighter, sharper, and more confident daily.
persona.pain_hi: Low confidence from body discomfort and low energy.
persona.desire_hi: Feel lighter, sharper, and more confident daily.

EN.headline: I started feeling lighter again.
EN.support_line: My clothes, energy, and confidence all started feeling better.
EN.context_line: For people who want to look better and feel better, this is the kind of change that matters.

HI.headline: I started feeling lighter again.
HI.support_line: My clothes, energy, and confidence all started feeling better.
HI.context_line: For people who want to look better and feel better, this is the kind of change that matters.

persona.name: Trust-First Buyer (Doctor-Backed Only)
persona.desire_en: Safe-feeling system with clear proof signals.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs founder credibility and structured protocol proof.
persona.desire_hi: Safe-feeling system with clear proof signals.
persona.proof_needed_hi: Needs founder credibility and structured protocol proof.

EN.headline: I only wanted something I could trust.
EN.support_line: Knowing it was doctor-formulated made a big difference for me.
EN.context_line: If trust is the first thing you look for, this shows why this felt more credible.

HI.headline: I only wanted something I could trust.
HI.support_line: Knowing it was doctor-formulated made a big difference for me.
HI.context_line: If trust is the first thing you look for, this shows why this felt more credible.

persona.name: Support-Dependent Persona (Needs Accountability)
persona.pain_en: Struggles to stay consistent without accountability.
persona.desire_en: Daily support that keeps follow-through high.
persona.friction_en: Drops routines when guidance is missing.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs tracker-led support and coach cues.
persona.pain_hi: Struggles to stay consistent without accountability.
persona.desire_hi: Daily support that keeps follow-through high.
persona.friction_hi: Drops routines when guidance is missing.
persona.proof_needed_hi: Needs tracker-led support and coach cues.

EN.headline: I did better because I was not alone.
EN.support_line: The guidance helped me stay on track.
EN.context_line: For people who know accountability improves results, this shows why support matters.

HI.headline: I did better because I was not alone.
HI.support_line: The guidance helped me stay on track.
HI.context_line: For people who know accountability improves results, this shows why support matters.

persona.name: Beginner Who Hates Complex Plans
persona.pain_en: Hates complicated plans and too many rules.
persona.desire_en: Simple steps with almost no guesswork.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs a very clear, easy-to-follow structure.
persona.pain_hi: Hates complicated plans and too many rules.
persona.desire_hi: Simple steps with almost no guesswork.
persona.proof_needed_hi: Needs a very clear, easy-to-follow structure.

EN.headline: I knew what to do from day one.
EN.support_line: I did not have to overthink every step.

HI.headline: I knew what to do from day one.

persona.name: 35+ Slow-Progress Persona
persona.pain_en: Progress feels slower after 35 despite effort.
persona.desire_en: Steady sustainable progress without extreme routines.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs realistic milestones and consistency proof.
persona.pain_hi: Progress feels slower after 35 despite effort.
persona.desire_hi: Steady sustainable progress without extreme routines.
persona.proof_needed_hi: Needs realistic milestones and consistency proof.

HI.headline: I stopped feeling like progress was impossible.
HI.support_line: What helped was a routine I could actually continue.

persona.name: New Mother (6+ months postpartum)
persona.pain_en: Routine changed after childbirth and time is limited.
persona.desire_en: A gentle return to steady progress that fits daily life.
persona.friction_en: Harsh or complex plans feel unrealistic right now.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs practical, supportive steps for a changed routine.
persona.pain_hi: Routine changed after childbirth and time is limited.
persona.desire_hi: A gentle return to steady progress that fits daily life.
persona.friction_hi: Harsh or complex plans feel unrealistic right now.
persona.proof_needed_hi: Needs practical, supportive steps for a changed routine.

EN.headline: I eased back into my routine gently.
EN.support_line: I needed something simple enough to fit my changed day.
EN.context_line: For new mothers ready to focus on themselves again, this shows a gentler restart.

HI.headline: I eased back into my routine gently.
HI.support_line: I needed something simple enough to fit my changed day.
HI.context_line: For new mothers ready to focus on themselves again, this shows a gentler restart.

persona.name: Menopause

persona.desire_en: Visible progress with a manageable, sustainable routine.
persona.friction_en: Usual methods feel harsher and harder to continue.
persona.proof_needed_en: Needs doctor-led credibility and real-life usability.
